heading: Purpose
label: 7401 Purpose
text: The purpose of this chapter is to implement the Agreement on Port State Measures to Prevent, Deter and Eliminate Illegal, Unreported and Unregulated Fishing.
notes: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 114–81, title III, § 301129 Stat. 664Nov. 5, 2015“This title [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Port State Measures Agreement Act of 2015’.”
amendments: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 114–81, title III, § 301129 Stat. 664Nov. 5, 2015“This title [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Port State Measures Agreement Act of 2015’.”
